title: deer-flow.stack-tuner.stage.start v1
description: A single stage within a stack-tuner cycle has begun. Pairs with stage.done sharing the same cycle_id+stage. Useful for live progress UIs and per-stage latency measurement. Compact form (source=/deer-flow) omits model; full form (source=/deer-flow/stack-tuner) includes it.

model.description: model id this stage will invoke (full form only)
